deliveries.commentary: back of a length on middle and off. Abhishek jabs it towards extra cover and remains on nought
lbw shout first up, but that would have gone down leg! In-swinging yorker that starts on leg and shapes in. Levitt, having advanced, misses it but is saved by the excessive movement
that is some response! Full and shaping into middle and off. Levitt plants his front foot, shows the maker's name and cracks it to mid off's right!
goes for the out-swinger this time but errs full on the pads. Levitt flicks it between mid on and mid wicket, and gets back for two
banged in short and this slants across the batter outside off. Levitt has a wild hack at it and gets nowhere close to it
sharp bumper on middle and leg. Levitt spots it early enough and opts to sway out of the way
spears it well down leg to start off. O'Dowd does not get bat on it and the umpire calls it a wide
peach! Back of a length on middle and off, and this straightens against the angle. O'Dowd dangles his bat in hope and is beaten all ends up
edged and four! Back of a length outside off and this shapes away late too. O'Dowd goes fishing at it and gets a thick enough outside edge to beat slip to his right!
beaten again! Back of a length outside off and this decks back in. O'Dowd has an airy waft at it and gets done in the inside. He missed that by a huge margin
oh, almost! Searing in-swinging yorker that finishes on off. O'Dowd jams his bat down just in time and keeps it out
back of a length outside off and O'Dowd has no clue about this either. Has a hopeful nibble at it, only to get beaten on the outside
shortish outside off. Levitt tries to force it through the off side and nearly ends up dragging it onto his stumps
edged but it falls just short! Back of a length on middle and off. Levitt backs away and nearly guides it straight to wide slip
banged in much shorter just outside off. Levitt opts to let it go

safe again! Hard length on middle and leg. Levitt opens up his stance and cloths it on the bounce to mid on. Could Sundar have gone for that to his right? Seemed to decide very early that he wanted to field it first and foremost
back of a length on the pads. O'Dowd helps it past the keeper and picks up a single
up and over! A hint of width offered and this is on the shorter side too. Levitt throws his hands at it and flays it over backward point!

nicked and shelled! Back of a length outside off. O'Dowd goes nibbling at it and gets a thick outside edge. The ball flies to Abhishek's left at wide slip but he cannot make it stick with one hand. Tough chance, it must be said!
back of a length in that probing corridor just outside off. O'Dowd goes sparring at this too and is beaten all ends up
full toss and smashed! First real error ball by a spinner tonight. Just outside off and Kishan, skipping down, carves it over cover!
back of a length, angling into off. O'Dowd stays leg side of the ball and taps it towards backward point
given a bit of air on a length on leg. Kishan advances and knocks it down to long off
full and shaping away wide outside off. O'Dowd throws the lot at it and slices it down to deep third
marginally short, and punished! A little outside off and that gives Kishan swinging room too. He hops back and hammers it to deep mid wicket's right!
back of a length just outside off. O'Dowd goes back and knocks it to long on

bowled off the elbow, and Dutt has two! Kishan cannot believe what has transpired! This is shortish again, tailing into leg stump. Kishan has a mow at it and swings too early. The ball first bounces up off the thigh pad and then kisses the bicep before rolling onto the stumps. Kishan tried to keep the ball away but was unable to do so. Netherlands' off-spin ploy has yielded two wickets!
pushed in on a length on middle and leg. SKY comes half forward and stabs it towards deep square leg
shortish on middle and off. Levitt winds up and drags it towards deep mid wicket
shortish and sliding into leg stump. Tilak backs away but cannot jab it past extra cover
glorious drive! Full and swinging away outside off. SKY covers the swing, leans into the drive and times it crisply past extra cover!
tossed up full outside off. O'Dowd has a big swish at it and chunks it off the inside edge towards deep mid wicket
back of a length on the pads. SKY tucks it towards deep square leg
incoming ball on a back of a length, tucking up the batter for room. Levitt chops it behind point
just over! Banged in short outside off. Tilak swipes at it and manages enough of a splice to clear mid wicket. That got big on him
back of a length, pushed into the pads. O'Dowd plays all over it and the ball rolls away into the off side
tossed up on a length on middle and leg. SKY comes forward and pushes it to long on
shortish outside off. Levitt gives himself room and jabs it towards extra cover
back of a length on middle and off. Tilak goes back and works it towards deep mid wicket
Levitt with another boundary! Dragged down and attempting to follow the batter outside leg. Levitt waits on it and swings it away behind square!
back of a length on middle and off. Keeps a little low and SKY jabs it out to extra cover
slowed up on a length on middle and off. Levitt opens his bat face and nurdles it towards backward point
slower ball on a back of a length outside off. SKY hangs back and runs it down to short third
begins with a change-up into the track outside off. de Leede gets up on his toes and punches it towards long off
full and wide outside off. Tilak reaches out for it and drives it towards backward point
smashed! Slower ball that ends up being a half-volley outside off. Levitt latches onto it and blitzes it past extra cover!
off-pace on a full length outside off. Tilak gets forward and pushes it to long off
back of a length outside off. Levitt takes a step down the track and taps it towards deep point
back of a length delivery hung up wide outside off. SKY shuffles across, trying to swipe it away, but does not lay bat on ball
dug in short outside off. Tilak picks it up and pulls it on the bounce to deep backward square leg. Seemed like another cutter
full outside off. Ackermann comes forward and pushes it towards sweeper cover
short and sliding down leg. SKY swings at it and misses, and the umpire calls it a wide too
de Leede with his first boundary! Given a bit of air outside off. de Leede dances down and slugs it to long on's right!

this goes a mile up, and dropped - oh dear! Shortish just outside off. SKY looks to hack it over the deep square leg, and gets it all wrong. Only gets height on it but thankfully for him, deep square leg puts down a sitter. Levitt tried to catch it too low and paid the price!

struck on the pad, and this looks very close. India review! Googly on a back of a length outside off. Nips back in and de Leede, looking for the sweep, misses it completely. Did this strike him in line? if it did, this could be curtains for him. No bat involved but the impact is Umpire's Call. Ball would have crashed into middle stump, but it does not matter. de Leede stays!
off-pace on a back of a length outside off. SKY hangs back and chops it behind point

another miscue, but it lands just short of the keeper! Slower bumper on leg stump and this cramps Dube on the pull. He has a short-arm tug at it and the ball loops off the glove. Edwards lunges forward but cannot quite get there
well well! Back of a length outside off. Ackermann walks across his stumps, trying to scoop it away, and misses. Not far from off stump that
fuller on the pads. Eased out to deep mid wicket
picked up and launched! Back of a length on middle and leg. Sits up a little and Ackermann uses his wrists to hoist it over deep square leg!
back of a length outside off. Dube stays back and pokes it towards mid off
fullish just outside off. SKY comes onto the front foot and pushes it past the bowler
back of a length just outside off. de Leede shape sofr the cut but chunks it off the inside edge past the stumps
back of a length on middle and off. Ball stops in the surface and Dube turns it towards mid wicket
back of a length on the stumps. Punched uppishly towards long on
fired in on a length on middle and off. Dube prods it back to the bowler
length ball on middle and leg. de Leede takes a step down the track before pushing it towards long on
pinged on the pad, but that is sliding down! Darted in on a length on leg. Dube gets trapped on the crease and plays all around it. Doing too much with the angle, however
Ackermann goes big again! Lobbed up into the slot on middle and off. Ackermann gives himself room and slams it over long on!
shortish and sneaking down leg. Dube tries to glance it fine and seems to miss it. A bit of an appeal by Edwards but that gets met with a wide call
almost a stunner! Back of a length outside off. Ackermann throws his hands at it and slices it towards point. Sundar jumps up, gets a hand to it but cannot cling on. Very tough chance
dug into the track outside off. Dube skips down the track and slaps it towards sweeper cover
full and wide outside off. de Leede does well to reach it and drills it towards sweeper cover
hung up on a length way outside off. Left alone and called a wide
back of a length on middle and leg. SKY drives it on the up towards long on
full and wide again. de Leede throws his hands at it and scuffs it out towards point
length ball on middle and leg, and pounded! Dube can use his long levers. He picks this ball up from middle stump and deposits it over cow corner!

Ackermann has another slog but this time, he perishes! And it is Chakravarthy with the breakthrough again. Incoming ball on a length on off. Ackermann gives it all he has but only gets the height he wants. Not enough distance and Rinku pouches it comfortably at deep mid wicket!
into the blockhole outside off. Dube jams down on it and digs it out into the off side

does him like a dinner, and Dutt is outta here! Googly on a full length just outside off. Spins in and Dutt has no idea where this is spinning. He has a swing at it, rather ambitiously, and misses the ball by a fair distance. Hears the rattling of the stumps soon after and Chakravarthy is on a hat-trick, again!
four more! Dube on the move! Floaty half-volley laced with width. Dube gets his hands through the ball and scorches it to extra cover's left!
fizzing googly on a length outside off. Edwards reads it off the pitch and guides it behind point to deny Chakravarthy
back of a length on middle and leg. SKY stands up on his toes and punches it between long on and deep mid wicket. Back for a brace as deep mid wicket reins it in
very full outside off. Edwards digs it out towards extra cover

straight to fine leg, and the India captain is outta here! This is a full ball on leg and there to be hit. SKY moves across and laces it too. But the problem is that he hits it flat and straight to the sweeper, stationed a little squarer than usualy. Simple enough catch, and India's captain has to walk back!
pumped into the stands again! This is a half-tracker outside off that is begging to be hit. de Leede obliges and swats it over long on!
full and slanting into off stump. Hardik plants his front foot and drives it crisply to long on to open his account
just short! Seems like a change-up, delivered full outside off. de Leede swishes at it and arrows it on the bounce to long off. Good effort by Tilak
slower ball on a fullish length on off. Hardik reaches out in front and pokes it towards extra cover
speared into the pads. Edwards works it into the open spaces in the mid wicket region
slower short ball wide outside off. Hardik gets up on his toes and cuts it towards deep point
back of a length on middle and leg. ZLC tucks it towards deep mid wicket
slower ball on a length outside off. Dube comes forward and punches it to long off
tossed up on a length on off. Edwards gets down on the sweep and helps it towards short fine leg
fired in on a length outside off. Hardik tries to hit it too hard and scuffs it towards extra cover
slower ball on a length outside off. ZLC a touch early into the shot and he chips it down to long on
floated up full just outside off. Hardik winds up and smacks it back past the bowler, but there is a fielder placed almost behind the umpire to cut that off
brilliant batting! Attempted slower yorker but this ends up being a gentle full toss on middle. Edwards unleashes the reverse-lap and nails it over short third!
into the crowd again! This is a proper buffet ball. Thigh-high full toss outside off and Dube whacks it over deep mid wicket!
off-pace on a back of a length outside off. Jabbed out towards extra cover
low full toss outside off. Dube winds up and drills it towards long off
length outside off. Hardik waits for it before jabbing it towards sweeper cover
back of a length on leg. ZLC hangs back and stabs it to long on
back of a length delivery wide outside off. Dube lets it go, and the umpire has no qualms in calling it a wide
right out of the screws! This is a half-tracker outside off and Dube needs no second invitation. He picks up the slower one and wallops it over deep square leg!
back of a length outside off. Croes hangs back and knocks it to long on
full and wide outside off. Dube throws his hands at it and flays it towards sweeper cover
slower short ball beyond the tramlines on the off side. Hardik tries to smash the cover off this and chunks it off the under-edge towards the keeper
slower bumper on leg stump. ZLC lets the ball come to him before swiping it towards deep square leg
another slower ball hung up on a length wide outside off. Hardik has an almighty mow at it but chalks it off the toe-end towards the keeper
another top shot! Fired in full just outside off. Croes shapes for the reverse-lap again and slams it over short third!
off-pace and dug in short outside off. Hardik tries to over-hit again and shanks it to a very straight mid on
zipped into the blockhole outside off. Croes attempts the sweep this time but the ball is too full. Off the pad and down to deep third
right in the gap, and Dube continues to motor along! Slower bumper on leg stump. Dube has to wait a while but when the ball arrives, he swipes it between deep square leg and fine leg!
low full toss slanted into off stump. ZLC tugs it towards deep mid wicket
zinged in full but just outside leg. Dube lets it go and gets the wide. But Klein is struggling here
slower ball on a back of a length on off. Croes drags it towards deep mid wicket
this is darted down leg again. Dube swings and misses, and the umpire has to indulge in some more exercise
up, up and away! Slower ball banged half-way down. Laced with width too and ZLC nearly swishes himself off his feet, slapping it just over the deep cover fence!
clever, clever batting! Zipped into the blockhole. On the pads, though, and Dube uses his wrists to adeptly clip it past short fine leg!
another short ball, tucking up the batter and getting big on him. ZLC splices his pull and the ball lobs harmlessly into the square leg region
on the shorter side again, moving away outside off. Levitt takes a step down before dabbing it to short third
back of a length, honing into off stump. O'Dowd gets behind the line and defends
back of a length on middle and off. Tilak, despite not being to the pitch of the ball, tries to go inside-out and chunks it off the inside edge into his body
four more! Slipped in full but also too far down leg. Tilak gets down on the sweep and then helps it away fine past the keeper!
slower ball on a length just outside off. Levitt presses half forward and blocks
short and put away! Dragged down and into the pads. O'Dowd uses the pace and the angle and smears it over deep backward square leg!
what timing! Speared in on leg stump but this is over-pitched, meaning that Tilak can snap his wrists into action and clip it delightfully between mid wicket and mid on!
shortish and angling into the hips. O'Dowd tugs it towards deep square leg
back of a length on the stumps. Tilak wants to tip and run to extra cover but his captain is not as interested
back of a length on the stumps. O'Dowd punches it to long on
back of a length on middle and off. SKY gets squared up a touch and pokes it towards backward point

leg stump out of the ground, and Chakravarthy breaks through! Seems like the googly, floated up full on middle and off. The ball spins back in, not that O'Dowd knew much about it. A hoick across the line fetches absolutely nothing, and his leg stump is left in a mess!
angled in full on off. SKY gets onto the front foot and pushes it towards mid on
back of a length just outside off and this nips in. de Leede nearly plays all over it but just manages a scratch before the ball hits the back leg
fullish on middle and leg. SKY bunts it to mid on and saunters across to the other end
back of a length and sliding down leg. No bat on ball, and the umpire signals a wide
back of a length, tucking up the batter on leg stump. SKY stabs it straight to mid wicket
fullish outside off. de Leede gets forward and knocks it to long on
back of a length on leg stump. Eased out to deep mid wicket
back of a length on off. de Leede hangs back and chips it towards long on
short and wide outside off. de Leede gets on top of the bounce and slaps it towards sweeper cover
back of a length on leg stump. SKY stands tall and punches it towards deep mid wicket

superb take on the fence, and Hardik has a wicket! Bashed into the track outside off. Levitt's eyes light up and he thinks he can tonk this into the stands. Does not generate the requisite power, though, and that brings Sundar into play at deep mid wicket. He leaps up, takes the catch and then maintains his balance to stay inside the field of play. Top work!
off-pace and into the track outside off. Tilak fetches it and drags it towards deep square leg
back of a length on off. Straightens and squares up Ackermann, who edges it down to deep third
full outside off. Tilak comes forward and drives it to long off
back of a length outside off. de Leede goes back and stabs it to long on
insult to injury! Slower ball banged in short on middle and leg. SKY steps out to the leg side and then slashes it well over short third!
honing into the stumps again. Ackermann comes forward and defends
bashed into the track again, on middle and leg. SKY backs away and drops it into the off side for a single
back of a length on off. Ackermann lets the ball come to him before meeting it right under his eyes

sliced in the air, and van der Merwe pulls off a special effort at long off! Full and wide, enticing Tilak to go downtown. He tries to smash this over long off but the bat face opens upon contact. The ball is arrowed towards long off, where van der Merwe moves to his right and then takes it reverse-cupped while falling to the turf. Brilliant, brilliant work, and India are now three down!
back of a length outside off. Ackermann scuffs it out towards sweeper cover
shortish and angling into middle and leg. Dube tucks it off his pads towards deep mid wicket
four more! Slow, short, wide and this is asking for trouble. de Leede frees his arms and crashes it to sweeper cover's right. One bounce and into the fence!
back of a length on middle and leg. SKy lets the ball come to him before knocking it down to long on
another slower bumper outside off and this balloons past the batter. Left alone and called a wide
changed-up dug in short outside off. de Leede hacks at it and jams it off the inside edge into his body

another massive lbw shout, and this looks a lot closer! Speared in on a length on middle. Dube plays the trajectory again and sits back. The ball skids on, rushes through past the inside edge and pings Dube on the back leg. Was it doing too much? No bat involved. Ball Tracking comes up and...it reckons the ball would have only clipped leg stump. Umpire's Call, and Dube stays!
angled in fuller on the pads. Ackermann works it towards deep mid wicket
slowed up on a length on off. Dube stretches forward and works it towards deep mid wicket
shortish and sliding into the hips. Dube swivels on his pull, times it well but cannot get it enough to deep backward square leg's left. Just a single
superb batting! Another attempted wide yorker. Ackermann telegraphs it, shuffles across and sweeps it over square leg!
slower ball on a full length on middle and leg. SKY flicks it out to deep mid wicket
on the bounce to long off! Dube succeeds in hiding this full and outside off. Ackermann slaps at it and is fortunate to still be out there
dug in short just outside off. Dube rides the bounce and short-arm-jabs it towards deep mid wicket
four more! Full and wide again (surprise, surprise). de Leede throws the plumbing at it and the ball hurtles off the toe-end past short third!
watch this ball fly too! Lobbed up right into the slot on middle and leg. Dube gets his front foot out of the way and clubs it over wide long on!
fired in full on the stumps. Driven down the ground to long on
speared in very full but also down leg. Dube lets it go and the umpire has to indulge in some more exercise
googly on a full length on off. Edwards comes forward and pushes it to long off
almost a yorker outside off. Dube clinks it out towards long off
back of a length on middle and off. Keeps a little low and de Leede stabs it into the gap between deep square and deep mid wicket. Dashes back for two
banged into the track outside off. Dube fetches it and pulls it towards deep mid wicket
very full and very wide outside off. Scuffed out towards extra cover
slower ball on a back of a length outside off. Hardik slaps it towards sweeper cover

Dube has a wicket, and he breathes a sigh of relief! Speared across full and wide. de Leede throws the kitchen sink at it and only musters a healthy outside edge. The ball flies to Varun at short third but he does well to cling on. Netherlands five down now!
off-pace again and dug in short outside off. Hardik takes a step down the track before dabbing it towards backward point
back of a length on the pads. Tucked away towards deep backward square leg
another change-up, on a back of a length outside off. Dube stabs it to long off
dragged down outside off. Hacked towards deep mid wicket
another slower short ball outside off. Hardik jumps up onto his toes and turns it towards deep mid wicket
back of a length on middle and leg. ZLC punches it towards long on
zipped in full on the pads. ZLC flicks it towards deep mid wicket
Hardik wants a piece of the action too! A little floaty and very much in the slot on leg stump. Hardik gets his front foot out of the way and clobbers it over wide long on!

stumps pinged, and Bumrah has the last laugh! Rattled in on a length on middle and off. Edwards moves across, trying to sweep Bumrah over short fine leg. Not the wisest plan in the world that. He gets beaten for pace and hears the ball thunder into middle stump moments later. Bumrah on the board now!
speared in full outside off. Not quite the yorker but Hardik cannot get under it fully. Powered on the bounce to long off
pin-point yorker, zoning into off stump. Croes jams his bat down in time and keeps it out
back of a length on middle and leg. Punched down the ground to long on
short ball, slanting into off. Hardik stands tall and hacks it towards deep backward square leg
gets it away, just! Darted in very full, just outside off. Croes brings out the reverse and gets a scratch that takes it past short third!
in the arc, and out of the park! This is pretty average bowling. Slot ball outside off. Slower ball too, and Dube smokes it over long on with minimal fuss!
four more! Length ball in and around off. Croes miscues his sweep but manages to nutmeg himself, and beat short fine leg to his right. Sundar not best pleased!
the ball is pinging off Dube's bat now, and he brings up his fifty in style! Tries to hide this on a back of a length outside off. Dube reaches it and then razes it between extra cover and long off!
another slower bumper outside leg, which follows Dube. Tugged away towards deep square leg
into the stumps at the other end! Juicy full toss just outside off. Croes lines it up and thunders it into the stumps at the other end. Croes will feel he missed out there
slow, short and wide outside off. Hardik jumps up onto his toes but slaps it straight to cover point
this is another cracking shot! Back of a length outside off. ZLC gives himself ample room and blasts it past extra cover!
safe! Slot ball on middle and leg. Dube gives it the big wind-up but shanks it badly. So badly that it falls well short of deep mid wicket
Hardik with a massive six now! Slower ball banged in short outside off. Hardik has tea and biscuits, and then demolishes it over long on!
Croes is flying now! Full and jammed in on leg stump. Croes moves across and then whips it between fine leg and deep square leg!
low full toss just outside off. Hardik, in trying to hit it too hard, loses his shape and plinks it off the toe-end towards mid wicket
smoked over the off side now! Half-way down again and Hardik's toe must be relieved it has escaped some bashing this over. Too much width as well and Croes pounds it over point!

this is a terrific shot - my goodness! How has Hardik gotten it there. And how has he generated so much power. This is slow and short outside off. Hardik leaps up into the air like a salmon and forehands it over long off!
